problem: vue-tsc@3.3.7 cannot run with native TypeScript 7 because TypeScript 7 lacks the stable programmatic/compiler API subpath vue-tsc expects. P0C attempted Microsoft’s official TypeScript 6 compatibility package under the package name typescript.

reproduction.previous: With typescript@7.0.2, vue-tsc failed with ERR_PACKAGE_PATH_NOT_EXPORTED for typescript/lib/tsc.
reproduction.current: With typescript aliasing @typescript/typescript6@6.0.2, vue-tsc fails with Failed to locate tsc module path from shim.

facts: TypeScript 7.0 does not ship with a stable API; TypeScript 7.1 is expected to ship a new and different API.
Microsoft published @typescript/typescript6 as a 6.0/7.0 transition compatibility package.
@typescript/typescript6 provides tsc6, re-exports the TypeScript 6 API, and is recommended through npm aliases for tools importing typescript directly.

Microsoft states workflows using Vue, MDX, Astro, Svelte, and similar tools likely cannot yet leverage TypeScript 7 because TypeScript 7 lacks a stable programmatic API and Volar-like tools can currently rely only on TypeScript 6.0.

compilerRoles.historicalTypescriptAlias: P0C installed @typescript/typescript6 under the package name typescript; P0D removes it from the active graph.
compilerRoles.historicalTypescript7Alias: P0C installed typescript@7.0.2 under typescript-7 for CLI identity only; P0D removes it from the active graph.
compilerRoles.currentTypescript: P0D uses real official typescript@6.0.3 as the authoritative Vue compiler.

authoritativeVueTypecheck.evidence: Error: Failed to locate tsc module path from shim at @volar/typescript/lib/quickstart/runTsc.js:39:27

supplementaryTypeScript7Validation.evidence: tsc --version => Version 7.0.2; this is only CLI identity validation.

prohibitedWorkarounds: plain tsc as Vue SFC typecheck
riskAssessment: The official compatibility package is present and side-by-side TypeScript 7 works, but current Volar/vue-tsc cannot consume the compatibility package tsc shim without a wrapper or patch, both forbidden in P0C.
reviewTriggers: stable TypeScript programmatic API support required by Vue tooling exists
stable Vue Language Tools support is released
removalConditions: Remove or archive only after a future accepted TypeScript 7 migration report documents stable upstream support and full project validation.
ownerDecision: P0D owner decision rejects the failed dual-compiler shim design and adopts the official TypeScript 6 ecosystem-compatible Vue baseline until stable TypeScript 7 Vue tooling support exists.

adoptedBaseline.reason: Highest stable official TypeScript 6.x release compatible with current stable vue-tsc.

finalOutcome.whyBridgeRejected: vue-tsc@3.3.7 through @volar/typescript@2.4.28 failed with Failed to locate tsc module path from shim when consuming @typescript/typescript6@6.0.2.
whyPatchingRejected: patch TypeScript exports or package internals
use patch-package or pnpm patched dependencies
replace Vue SFC typecheck with plain tsc
futureReviewTriggers: stable TypeScript programmatic API support required by Vue tooling exists
stable Vue Language Tools support is released
removalOrArchivalConditions: Keep this file as historical evidence until a future accepted TypeScript 7 migration report supersedes it.
supersededP0CConstraints: P0C retained TypeScript 7 and rejected removal in that phase; P0D supersedes that constraint by owner decision and removes TypeScript 7 from the active graph.
P0C used @typescript/typescript6 under the package name typescript; P0D rejects that active bridge because current stable Volar/vue-tsc cannot consume the shim.

historicalP0CProhibitedWorkarounds: plain tsc as Vue SFC typecheck
